urdu transliteration text:
Tera Chehlum Manane Ghurbat Pe
Qaid Khane Se Aagayi Zainab
english translation text: To Commemorate Your 40th in LonelinessZainab As Come From The Prison

urdu transliteration text:
Brother… Zainab Has Come
Bhaiyya... Aagayi Zainab

Paas Tere Teri Sakina Ko
Saath Apne Na Laa Saki Zainab
english translation text: Zainab Could Not Bring Sakina With Her To You

urdu transliteration text:
Haye Atthara Bhaiyo Wali
Berida Shaam Hoke Aayi Hai
english translation text: Oh The One With 18 Brothers Has Come From Sham Without Any Covering

urdu transliteration text:
Neel Zakhmo Ke Aur Baazu Par
Rassiyo Ke Nishaan Laayi Hai
english translation text: With Bruised Wounds And ArmsCovered With Marks Of Ropes

urdu transliteration text:
Tune Paala Tha Jisko Naazo Se
Ab Wo Zainab Nahi Rahi Zainab
english translation text: After You Raised Her With Such CareNow That Zainab, Isn’t That Zainab Anymore

urdu transliteration text:
Brother… Zainab Has Come
Bhaiyya... Aagayi Zainab

Itne Chhale Pade Hai Payro Mein
Mujhse Bhaiyya Chala Nahi Jaata
english translation text: I Have So Many Blisters In My FeetBrother I Can’t Walk Anymore

urdu transliteration text:
Dil Ye Kehta Hai Kehdu Sab Tumse
Par Zubaa Se Kaha Nahi Jaata
english translation text: My Heart Says To Tell You EverythingMy Tongue Doesn’t Let Me Speak Anymore

urdu transliteration text:
Kabhi Kaato'n Bhari Zamee'n Pe Chali
Aur Kabhi Aag Par Chali Zainab
english translation text: Sometimes, Zainab Walked On Thornes And Sometimes She Walked On Fire

urdu transliteration text:
Brother… Zainab Has Come
Bhaiyya... Aagayi Zainab

Bekasi Maa Ki Yaad Aati Thi
Apni Ghurbat Ko Bhool Jaati Thi
english translation text: Remembering My Helpless MotherI Used To Forget My Own Situation

urdu transliteration text:
Mujhko Darbaar Mein Sharabi Ke
Amma Zahra Ki Yaad Aati Thi
english translation text: In The Court Of The Drunkard,I Used To  Remember My Mother Zahra

urdu transliteration text:
Log Teri Bahan Pe Haste The
Sar Jhukaye Khadi Rahi Zainab
english translation text: People Used To Laugh At Your Sister (Zainab) As She Stood With Her Head Lowered

urdu transliteration text:
Brother… Zainab Has Come
Bhaiyya... Aagayi Zainab

Haye Meri Janib Ishare Karte The
Shehr E Kufa Ke Log Has Has Kar
english translation text: The People Of Kufa Used To Point And Laugh At Me

urdu transliteration text:
Jis Se Sajjad Ne Rida Maangi
Usne Maare Ghareeb Ko Patthar
english translation text: When Sajjad Asked For A Head Cover, They Hit Him With Stones

urdu transliteration text:
Aakhri Saans Tak Na Bhulegi
Kufe Walo Ki Be Rukhi Zainab
english translation text: Till Her Last Breath Zainab Will Not Forget The Cruelty Of The People Of Kufa

urdu transliteration text:
Brother… Zainab Has Come
Bhaiyya... Aagayi Zainab

Wo Jo Puchegi Apne Akbar Ka
Jaake Sughra Ko Kya Bataungi
english translation text: When She Asks About Her AkbarWhat Will I Tell Sughra?

urdu transliteration text:
Saath Tera Agar Nahi Hoga
Qabr Pe Maa Ke Kaise Jaungi
english translation text: How Will She Go To The Grave Of Mother Without You

urdu transliteration text:
Oh Stranger Without YouZainab Won’t Go Home
Aye Ghareeb Ul Watan Baghair Tere
Laut Kar Ghar Na Jayegi Zainab

Brother… Zainab Has Come
Bhaiyya... Aagayi Zainab

Haye Kabhi Takti Thi Wo Tere Sar Ko
Kabhi Abbas Ko Bulati Thi
english translation text: Oh When She Used To Stroke Your (Hussain) Head, Sometimes She Used To Call Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Meri Aankho'n Ke Saamne Bhaiyya
Teri Bachhi Tamache Khati Thi
english translation text: In Front Of My Eyes BrotherYour Daughter Was Slapped

urdu transliteration text:
Haath Mere Bandhe The Gardan Se
Shimr Ko Kaise Rokti Zainab
english translation text: My Hand Were Tied To My NeckHow Could I Stop Shimr?

urdu transliteration text:
Brother… Zainab Has Come
Bhaiyya... Aagayi Zainab

Qabr E Mazloom Par Takallum Ye
Keh Rahi Thi Batool Ki Jayi
english translation text: On The Grave Of The Oppressed, Takallum, Batool’s Beloved Was Saying,

urdu transliteration text:
Tujh Se Wada Bahan Ye Karti Hai
Khatm Ho Jayegi Ye Tanhayi
english translation text: She Has Promised You That This Loneliness Will End

urdu transliteration text:
Tera Chehlum Manayegi Duniya
Ibteda Aaj Kar Chuki Zainab
english translation text: Your 40th Will Be Commemorate By The Whole World. Zainab Has Started It Today

urdu transliteration text:
Brother… Zainab Has Come
Bhaiyya... Aagayi Zainab
